CustomField.description: Link to the last major Assembly Event or Performance Restoration/Overhaul according to the Assembly Events related list. Minor/Major Events are defined on the Maintenance Program Event level
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Link to the last major Assembly Event or Performance Restoration/Overhaul according to the Assembly Events related list. Minor/Major Events are defined on the Maintenance Program Event level
CustomField.label: Last Assembly Event (Major)
